secrets.description: Public on-chain address of the game wallet (utpk1... pubkey). Incoming guesses are sent to it and payouts originate from it; paired with APP_SECRET_KEY. Generate a keypair with usernode-dapp-starter's scripts/generate-keypair.js. Public identifier (already exposed via the game state endpoint), so not private.

Secret key for the game wallet (paired with the hardcoded APP_PUBKEY), used to sign server-side round-lifecycle and payout transactions on the real testnet. Required in production; staging resolves to an empty key and skips real payouts.
Normal round duration in milliseconds before the timer expires.
Timed Mode round duration in milliseconds (used when timedMode is active).
Minimum number of guesses required before a normal round can end. If not met, the round extends.

tests.name: Game loads without console errors
Place Guess button is present on the Game tab
Leaderboard tab renders
Game state endpoint returns data
Duration badge renders on active round
Track selector renders
State endpoint returns per-track data
A round auto-starts (current round present)
State endpoint includes all four tracks
State endpoint includes bestWinGuessCount in player stats
State endpoint includes difficulties map
State endpoint includes difficulty field on rounds
State endpoint includes easy difficulty bucket
State endpoint includes hard difficulty bucket
Leaderboard difficulty selector renders
Usernames cache serves seeded staging name
Sign-in gate markup is present
Welcome greeting element is present
Demo mode loads the guess button without console errors
State endpoint exposes the staging flag
My Games tab renders in the bottom nav
Personal history endpoint returns demo results
Account identity endpoint returns the signed-in username
Account badge markup is present in the header
Filtered usernames endpoint still serves visible players
Leaderboard tab loads with the blocked player filtered out
Demo relay-timeout route loads the guess button without console errors
